positioning: Warm, welcoming, approachable. The local favorite that takes care of kids, teens, and parents. Community-oriented family practice that emphasizes trust, comfort, and multi-generational care.
messagingBehavior: Leads with comfort, trust, and family care. Balanced budget messaging. Warm and friendly voice — like talking to a trusted neighbor. Multi-generational appeal, community-minded, never intimidating.

typography.style: Rounded, friendly, welcoming; warm without being childish

layout: Not too tight, not too sparse

divergenceContract.headlineType: Nunito / Poppins rounded sans-serif, Regular–Bold — friendly, never childish. NEVER an elegant serif, never a stark modern sans.
divergenceContract.layout: Symmetrical or near-symmetrical; friendly frames/borders; photos at center stage; warm, generous negative space.
divergenceContract.color: Accent #38a169 (friendly green) in a warm, soft palette; avoid cold or stark schemes.
divergenceContract.imagery: Candid multi-generational moments — kids AND parents equally — in local/outdoor community settings; togetherness over studio polish.
divergenceContract.signature: The trusted neighbor — warm, community, all-ages-welcome. The deliberate opposite of corporate, clinical, or luxury.
